name: Kahlua Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a greased bundt pan.
3. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared bundt pan.
5. Bake for 45-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
7. Serve cold. Enjoy! It is very important to serve this cake cold. While most cakes taste better warm, this one is unbelievably delicious when served cold.
